seo.title: Building Content Generation with Llama Stack + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build content generation with Llama Stack + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Llama Stack provides a standardized Python interface for building sophisticated Llama-powered agents with built-in safety, memory, and tool integration, making it ideal for content generation workflows. Integrating Vex guardrails ensures generated content adheres to brand voice, factual accuracy, and editorial standards while mitigating common agent failures like safety false positives and schema mismatches. This guide shows how to wrap Llama Stack agent responses with vex.verify() for reliable, production-ready content creation.

architectureOverview.heading: Content Generation Architecture with Llama Stack
architectureOverview.description:
The typical Llama Stack content generation architecture features an agent loop that orchestrates research (web search tools), drafting (LLM generation), fact-checking (retrieval from memory/knowledge base), and editing (brand voice enforcement). Safety shields filter harmful content, memory banks store brand guidelines and past content for context, and tools handle SEO analysis and plagiarism checks. The agent iterates until editorial criteria are met or turn limits are reached.

Vex integrates as a post-processing verification layer after each agent turn, validating outputs against brand consistency, factual accuracy, originality, tone, and SEO compliance before final approval. This prevents propagation of errors through the agentic loop and catches subtle drifts from guidelines.

The workflow flows from user prompt → agent orchestration → tool execution → LLM reasoning → Vex verification → approved content or loop iteration.

risks.name: Safety shield false positives
risks.description: Llama Stack's safety filters block benign creative content containing colloquial language or brand-specific metaphors
risks.mitigation: Vex brand consistency checks whitelist approved voice patterns before safety filtering

risks.name: Turn limit exhaustion
risks.description: Agent loops indefinitely refining content without converging on approvable output
risks.mitigation: Vex progressive verification with escalating criteria across turns

risks.name: Tool schema violations
risks.description: SEO or fact-check tools return malformed JSON that breaks agent parsing
risks.mitigation: Vex schema validation on all tool responses before agent consumption

risks.name: Memory hallucination
risks.description: Retrieval associates wrong brand guidelines or fabricates citation sources
risks.mitigation: Vex factual accuracy traces memory sources and validates against ground truth

implementation.title: Initialize Llama Stack Client
implementation.description: Set up the Llama Stack client with content generation tools and brand memory context.
implementation.code:
from llama_stack_client import LlamaStack
from vex import verify

# Initialize Llama Stack
stack = LlamaStack(
    model="llama-3.2-90b",
    safety_config={"threshold": 0.7},
    memory_bank="brand_guidelines"
)

# Define content generation tools
content_tools = {
    "web_search": stack.get_tool("serpapi"),
    "seo_analyzer": stack.get_tool("seo_checker"),
    "plagiarism_check": stack.get_tool("copyleaks")
}

implementation.title: Brand Voice Agent Loop
implementation.description: Core agent loop that generates, refines, and verifies content adhering to brand standards.

implementation.title: Fact-Checking Tool Integration
implementation.description: Invoke fact-checking tools and validate responses against expected schemas.
implementation.code:
def fact_check_content(content: str):
    tool_response = stack.tools["web_search"].call(
        query=f"verify facts in: {content[:200]}..."
    )
    
    # Extract citations
    citations = stack.parse_tool_response(tool_response)
    
    verified_facts = verify(
        content,
        context=citations,
        checks=["factual_accuracy"]
    )
    
    return verified_facts.citations

implementation.title: SEO Optimization Pass
implementation.description: Final SEO compliance check with keyword density and structure validation.
